entry_size_is_next_layer_size
code:
pub open spec(checked) fn entry_size_is_next_layer_size(self, i: nat) -> bool
        recommends
            i < self.layers.len(),
    {
        i + 1 < self.layers.len() ==> self.entry_size(i) == self.entry_size((i + 1) as nat)
            * self.num_entries((i + 1) as nat)
    }
